name: AppTech Payments Corp.
summary: AppTech Payments Corp. is a financial technology company providing digital banking infrastructure, embedded finance, and omnichannel payment solutions. It operates the AppTech Banking Platform, a cloud-native multi-tenant system enabling digital banking, account-based processing, onboarding, and compliance for financial institutions. It also runs FinZeo, a Payments-as-a-Service business serving merchants and ISOs, and acquired Infinitus Pay, Inc. for cross-border payments and multi-currency transaction capabilities.
